comment: Holland (1981) representation-mediated food aversion: tone-flavor, then tone-lithium, test flavor.
input: MediatedConditioning(phase1 = Pair.ForwardDelay(tone, flavor, isi=5-s, cs_duration=10-s), phase2 = Pair.ForwardDelay(tone, lithium, isi=5-s, cs_duration=10-s), test = CSOnly(flavor, trials=8))
